# Saoko Sushi Bar

[![Petra Pendić](https://cdn.dribbble.com/users/4380208/avatars/normal/af57e6b43323ec5dfcfe0d3c036e04d7.jpg?1770224354)](https://dribbble.com/ppendic)

[Petra Pendić](https://dribbble.com/ppendic)

for
[PROTOTYP](https://dribbble.com/prototyp)

Available for work


[Follow](https://dribbble.com/ppendic/followers) [Following](https://dribbble.com/ppendic/followers/ppendic)

[Save shot](https://dribbble.com/signups/new "Save shot")

[Get in touch](https://dribbble.com/signups/new "Get in touch")

Getting inspired by mesmerizing and bold type, I’ve created a Landing page exploration for a Japanese Sushi bar located in the streets of Tokyo.

Loving what you see?

[![PROTOTYP](https://cdn.dribbble.com/users/1860538/avatars/normal/76f50808abc10c9aaac9f95924da5945.png?1770646754)](https://dribbble.com/prototyp)

[PROTOTYP](https://dribbble.com/prototyp)

[Get in touch](https://dribbble.com/signups/new "Get in touch")

#### More by PROTOTYP

[View profile](https://dribbble.com/prototyp)
